rewrite.text:
PROVE ex1: ∀ n : nat, n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : nat

  INDUCTION n

  PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
    FACT h1: 0 + 0 = 0 [BY plus_zero_left]
    THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0 [BY h1]
    CONCLUDE: base case holds [QED]

  PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S n'
    ASSUME n' : nat
    INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: n' + 0 = n' [BY induction_hypothesis]
    FACT h2: S n' + 0 = S (n' + 0) [BY plus_succ]
    FACT h3: S (n' + 0) = S n' [BY ih]
    THEREFORE S n' + 0 = S n' [BY h2, h3]
    CONCLUDE: inductive case holds [QED]

  CONCLUDE: ∀ n : nat, n + 0 = n [QED]
END

BEGIN
  ASSUME n : nat

  INDUCTION n

  PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
    FACT h1: 0 + 0 = 0 [BY plus_zero_left]
    THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0 [BY h1]
    CONCLUDE: base case holds [QED]

  PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S n'

    INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: n' + 0 = n' [BY induction_hypothesis]
    FACT h2: S n' + 0 = S (n' + 0) [BY plus_succ]
    FACT h3: S (n' + 0) = S n' [BY ih]
    THEREFORE S n' + 0 = S n' [BY h2, h3]
    CONCLUDE: inductive case holds [QED]

  CONCLUDE: ∀ n : nat, n + 0 = n [QED]
END
